configuration.title: PlantUML Markdown Preview
configuration.plantumlJarPath.descriptio: Path to the PlantUML jar file. Leave empty to use the bundled jar (LGPL). Example: /usr/local/lib/plantuml.jar
configuration.javaPath.description: Path to the Java executable (Java 11+ required). If set, this value is used as-is. Otherwise, JAVA_HOME/bin/java is tried first, then 'java' on PATH. Default: java
configuration.dotPath.description: Path to the Graphviz dot executable (default: dot)
configuration.plantumlIncludePath.descri: Base directory for PlantUML !include directives. Paths in !include are resolved relative to this directory. Leave empty to use the workspace root. Not available in Easy mode (remote server). Default: (empty)
configuration.pdfScale.description: PDF export scale factor. Scales text and diagrams uniformly. Range: 0.1–2.0. Default: 0.625
Debounce delay (ms) when only non-diagram text changes. Diagrams are served from cache, so the update is fast. Leave empty to use the mode default (Fast: 100, Secure: 100, Easy: 100).
configuration.debounceDiagramChangeMs.de: Debounce delay (ms) when diagram content changes (triggers re-rendering). Leave empty to use the mode default (Fast: 100, Secure: 300, Easy: 300).
configuration.plantumlTheme.description: PlantUML diagram theme. 'default' uses PlantUML default (no theme applied). Set a theme name (e.g. 'cyborg', 'mars') to pass -theme to PlantUML CLI. Default: default
configuration.plantumlScale.description: PlantUML diagram scale. 'auto' shrinks diagrams that exceed container width. A percentage renders at that fraction of natural size. SVG remains crisp at any scale. Default: 100%
configuration.plantumlScale.auto: Auto — shrink to fit container width if larger
configuration.mermaidTheme.base: Base — minimal theme for custom styling
configuration.mermaidScale.description: Mermaid diagram scale. 'auto' scales to fit container width. A percentage renders all diagrams at that fraction of their natural size with fixed dimensions, like PlantUML. Default: 80%
configuration.mermaidScale.auto: Auto — scale to fit container width
configuration.d2Scale.description: D2 diagram scale. 'auto' shrinks diagrams that exceed container width. A percentage renders at that fraction of natural size. SVG remains crisp at any scale. Default: 70%
configuration.d2Scale.auto: Auto — shrink to fit container width if larger
configuration.d2Theme.description: D2 diagram theme. Select a theme to change the visual style of D2 diagrams. Default: Neutral Default
configuration.d2Layout.description: D2 layout engine. 'dagre' is the default; 'elk' provides an alternative layout algorithm. Default: dagre
configuration.d2Layout.elk: ELK — Eclipse Layout Kernel, alternative layout
configuration.htmlMaxWidth.description: Maximum width of the HTML export body. Controls how wide the document content area is when exported. Default: 960px
configuration.htmlAlignment.description: HTML export body alignment. Default: center
configuration.enableMath.description: Enable KaTeX math rendering. Supports $...$ (inline) and $$...$$ (block) syntax. Default: true
configuration.allowLocalImages.descripti: Allow loading local images in the preview. When enabled, relative image paths (e.g. ![](./image.png)) are resolved and displayed. Mode default (Fast: on, Secure: off, Easy: on).
configuration.allowLocalImages.mode-defa: Mode default — Fast: on, Secure: off, Easy: on
configuration.allowHttpImages.descriptio: Allow loading images over HTTP (unencrypted) in the preview. Useful for intranet or local development servers. Disabled by default for security. Default: false
configuration.mode.description: Preset mode. Controls rendering method, debounce timing, and security defaults in one setting.
configuration.mode.fast: Fast (default) — Local server, instant re-renders. Requires Java 11+. Nothing leaves your machine.
configuration.mode.secure: Secure — No network access, highest security. Requires Java 11+. Local images blocked by default.
configuration.mode.easy: Easy — No setup required (diagram source sent to PlantUML server).
configuration.plantumlServerUrl.descript: PlantUML server URL for Easy mode. Default: https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml. Set to a self-hosted server URL for privacy.
configuration.previewTheme.description: Preview theme. Controls the overall document style and code block syntax highlight together. Default: github-light
configuration.previewTheme.github-light: GitHub Light (Default) — white background, dark text. Code blocks: github-dark-dimmed
configuration.previewTheme.atom-light: Atom Light — white background, soft gray text. Atom editor inspired.
configuration.previewTheme.one-light: One Light — off-white background, balanced palette. Atom One Light inspired.
configuration.previewTheme.solarized-lig: Solarized Light — warm beige background, eye-friendly colors.
configuration.previewTheme.vue: Vue — white background, green accents. Vue.js documentation inspired.
configuration.previewTheme.pen-paper-cof: Pen Paper Coffee — warm paper background, brown-tinted text. Cozy handwritten aesthetic.
configuration.previewTheme.coy: Coy — near-white background, clean design. Prism.js Coy inspired.
configuration.previewTheme.vs: Visual Studio Light — white background, classic VS color scheme. Blue keywords, green comments.
configuration.previewTheme.github-dark: GitHub Dark — dark background, light text. Code blocks: github-dark
configuration.previewTheme.atom-dark: Atom Dark — dark background, muted text. Tomorrow Night palette.
configuration.previewTheme.one-dark: One Dark — dark background, muted text. Atom/VS Code inspired.
configuration.previewTheme.solarized-dar: Solarized Dark — deep teal background, eye-friendly colors.
configuration.plantumlLocalServerPort.de: Port for the local PlantUML server in Fast mode. 0 = auto-assign a free port (recommended). Default: 0
configuration.previewTheme.monokai: Monokai — dark background, vivid syntax colors. Sublime Text inspired.
configuration.enableDiagramViewer.descri: Enable right-clicking a diagram in the preview to open it in a pan & zoom viewer. (Requires reopening the preview)
configuration.retainPreviewContext.descr: Retain preview content when the tab is hidden. Prevents re-rendering on tab switch but uses more memory. (Requires reopening the preview)
